title: TRANSITION_WITH_QUESTION_HEADINGS log payload
description: Structured payload for the pino `warn`-level log line emitted by `integrateClarificationAnswers` (in `packages/orchestrator/src/worker/clarification-poster.ts`) when a `*Pending*` → `<answer>` transition is written to clarifications.md from a source comment whose body still contains `### Q<n>:` heading(s). This is the residual-race detector: FR-001 (isQuestionComment) and FR-002 (content skip) both let this comment through, yet its structure resembles a bot-authored questions comment. Alerts here indicate an uncovered failure vector that needs post-mortem.

code.description: Machine-readable event code. Distinct from SKIPPED_SUSPICIOUS_ANSWER (which fires when the filter caught the offender).

commentId.description: GitHub numeric id of the source comment. Operators can jump to it via https://github.com/OWNER/REPO/issues/N#issuecomment-{commentId}.

issueNumber.description: The GitHub issue number where the transition happened, for cross-referencing with workflow state.

questionNumber.description: The question number that transitioned from *Pending* to answered (1-based).

answer.description: First 120 characters of the integrated answer text. Truncated to keep log volume bounded and to prevent large bot-generated bodies from bloating logs.
